examiner_notes: VQ-S2-002 (severity 7, scope violation) was a false positive: verifier counted 4 pre-existing hunks as S2 changes. Pre-existing diff predates this session (M status in initial git status). All AC-BUG-* checks passed cleanly.

retrospective.friction: Verifier had no visibility into the pre-existing bug.md modifications — it attributed all 6 diff hunks to S2. Lead resolved by inspecting git diff directly and confirming only 3 hunks were S2-introduced.
retrospective.suggestions: When a file has pre-existing uncommitted changes, the verification prompt should explicitly note this and instruct the verifier to evaluate only the story's insertion points, not the total diff.
